chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2938 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.17351/2024 2. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 11.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant at the very out does not press the instant criminal bail application on merits and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant/ accused preferably within a period of three months. Order accordingly. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
